data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: The website is designed to minimize the time it takes for a user to make a decision by limiting the number of choices.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation menus and concise call-to-action elements.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interactive elements are sized and placed to reduce the cursor movement required for user action.
data.technical_spec: Proper button spacing and size adjustments for touch screens.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Design prioritizes a visually pleasing interface, creating a perception of ease-of-use.
data.technical_spec: Consistent color schemes and modern typography.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design reflects common conventions to meet user expectations based on experiences from other platforms.
data.technical_spec: Familiar navigation layout and interface patterns.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Information chunks are strategically grouped to enhance user comprehension and retention.
data.technical_spec: Segmented content blocks with intuitive headings.
